LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CAROLINA LOPEZ'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT IS DENIED, ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF MAY NOT ULTIMATELY BE ENTITLED TO SOME OF THE DECLARATIONS REQUESTED, THAT CAN BE DETERMINED AT A LATER STAGE. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(C). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
